# Balinjera Restaurant

> Traditional Ethiopian restaurant in Tel Aviv, Israel, specializing in injera and shared Ethiopian meals.

Balinjera (באלינג'רה) serves traditional Ethiopian food at Malan 4 / HaKovshim 39 in Kerem HaTeimanim, near Carmel Market. The site is bilingual: Hebrew is the default RTL experience, and English LTR pages are available with the `?lang=en` query parameter.

Important details:

- Cuisine: Traditional Ethiopian, specializing in injera (אינג'רה)
- Hours: Sunday–Thursday 12:00–20:00, Friday 11:00–15:00, Saturday closed
- Phone: 03-525-2527
- Email: fantaprada25@gmail.com

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.balinjera.com/): Main restaurant page with overview, hours, contact details, and ordering links.
- [About](https://www.balinjera.com/about): Background on Balinjera, Ethiopian food traditions, and the restaurant story.
- [Menu](https://www.balinjera.com/menu): Restaurant menu and dishes.
- [Events and Catering](https://www.balinjera.com/events): Private events, catering, and group meal inquiries.
- [Blog](https://www.balinjera.com/blog): Articles about Ethiopian food, injera, and eating together at Balinjera.

## Language Versions

- [Hebrew home](https://www.balinjera.com/): Default Hebrew RTL version.
- [English home](https://www.balinjera.com/?lang=en): English LTR version.
- [English about](https://www.balinjera.com/about?lang=en): English restaurant background.
- [English menu](https://www.balinjera.com/menu?lang=en): English menu page.
- [English events and catering](https://www.balinjera.com/events?lang=en): English events and catering page.

## Featured Articles

- [Injera, Heart of the Meal](https://www.balinjera.com/blog/injera-heart-of-meal): Article about injera and its role in Ethiopian cuisine.
- [Eating Together at Balinjera](https://www.balinjera.com/blog/eat-together-balinjera): Article about shared Ethiopian dining.

## Ordering and Social Profiles

- [Online orders on Wolt](https://wolt.com/he/isr/tel-aviv/restaurant/balinjera): Online ordering for Balinjera.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/ethiopianfoodrestaurant/): Balinjera Instagram profile.
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/Traditional.Ethiopian.Cuisine/): Balinjera Facebook page.
